name: plaud-connector
description: Plaud.ai recording connector — discovers new recordings, triggers transcription, resolves speakers via calendar, and ingests to the configured knowledge management system
author: David O'Hara

connection.note: This connector provides skills and workflows only — no dedicated MCP server. It orchestrates existing MCP dependencies (M365, KMS adapter) declared in dependencies.mcp_servers.

defaults_replaced.plaud-recording-ingest: Provides full Plaud.ai recording pipeline — discovery, transcription triggering, speaker identification, and KMS ingest. Replaces any manual Plaud transcript handling.

kms.description: Knowledge management system target for note ingest

install_notes: After installing, set 'kms' and 'dataverse' in config/settings.json to match your environment. On first use, run the Chrome login flow documented in skills/plaud-transcripts/SKILL.md to capture your Plaud API token. The fetch script (skills/plaud-transcripts/scripts/fetch_plaud.py) must be accessible on the host Mac.
